data.body: bdbe plan-review painful (sonnet-4-6 pedantic on a test story): BLOCK#1 orphan AC3->added scope+dedicated non-lock test; BLOCK#2 probe-first-attempt-outside-loop->clarified pre-loop fires as attempt1; INDETERMINATE(16 nitpicks)->specified result type=CompletedProcess, monkeypatch teardown, attempt numbering, production-None-guard; BLOCK#3 cited df83 _reclaim_probe as existing precedent but df83 not in reviewed base SHA->reworded to generic standard seam pattern. Re-running review round 5.
